content:
The Trickster’s Lair (Unstable Reality)
The professor can randomly switch the setting at mid-class.


📜 Why This Works:
✔ Makes the professor’s role unpredictable.
✔ Ensures student agency in deciding who runs the session.
✔ Introduces setting-based dynamics that shift power.

📜 3. How Students Decide the Weekly Leader

📜 Instead of a direct vote, students answer cryptic questions that determine the professor’s role.

✔ The professor presents three thematic riddles or paradoxes.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 385 (chunk 385/555)
